selectivity_implications.recommendation: ACB Icn 100 kA per NEC 110.9 — adequate at 38 kA
MCCB Icn 35 kA — adequate at 35 kA. Marginal headroom. Cascade rating per NEC 240.86 if downstream starters need 25 kA Icn.

non_compliance_flags.message: Motor contribution material — 14% of total Ik" at MCC. Verify Icn ratings at MCC starters individually.

assumptions: POCO PSCC declared 25 kA at HV primary; X/R = 6 typical for US 12.47 kV.
Cable impedance from NEC 2023 Chapter 9 Table 9 at 75°C.

rationale.chat_summary: US industrial 12.47 kV → 480V TPN, 2500 kVA TX. 500 kW motor load contributes 14% of Ik" — material per IEC 60909-0:2016 §4.5.1.2. ACB 100 kA + MCCB 35 kA adequate. Motor contribution flag emitted; verify individual MCC starter Icn. tool_call_pending until cascade tool runs.

sections.title: Source Specification
sections.summary: Utility + motor aggregate. 2500 kVA TX (Zpu 6%) + 500 kW motor load (ILR 5).

sections.title: Cascade Topology
sections.summary: 5 nodes — HV → TX → MSB → busbar → MCC.

sections.title: HV-side Assumptions
sections.summary: 12.47 kV radial, declared PSCC 25 kA, X/R 6. c_max=1.10.

sections.title: Transformer + Source Impedances
sections.summary: Z_TX = 5.53 mΩ at LV. X/R 8. Cable Z from NEC Chapter 9 Table 9.

sections.title: Motor Contribution Assessment
sections.summary: 500 kW × ILR 5 → 3 kA contribution at MCC. Above 1% threshold per §4.5.1.2 — include.

sections.title: Per-node Ifault Computation
sections.summary: Ik"max range 27.5-52 kA across cascade. ipk range 67-123 kA.

decisions.label: tool_call_pending
decisions.summary: Multi-source + motor aggregate requires tool execution.

sections.title: Selectivity Implications
sections.summary: ACB 100 kA adequate. MCCB 35 kA adequate but marginal at 35 kA. Cascade-rate downstream MCC starters per NEC 240.86.

decisions.label: NEC 110.9 + 240.86 compliance
decisions.summary: All breakers verified against IEC 60909-derived Ik".

sections.title: Compliance + Assumptions
sections.summary: Compliant with one motor-contribution flag for awareness. tool_call_pending logged.
